introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 对个体、事件或类别数量的离散计数。

introduced_concepts.name: Order Term
introduced_concepts.definition: A remainder term describing the asymptotic size of an expression.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 描述表达式渐近规模的余项。

views.name: Class Selection Coefficient
views.definition: A selection coefficient assigned to one class or genotype.
views.definition_zh: 分配给某一类别或基因型的选择系数。

introduced_concepts.name: Likelihood
introduced_concepts.definition: A measure of how well a model explains observed data.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 衡量模型解释观测数据程度的量。

introduced_concepts.name: Delta
introduced_concepts.definition: A local change or increment in the modeled quantity.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中某个量的局部变化或增量。

introduced_concepts.name: Tau-hat
introduced_concepts.definition: Tau-hat is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Tau-hat 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Theta
introduced_concepts.definition: Theta is a background quantity used in the local formula context.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: Theta 是当前公式涉及的背景概念，用来帮助解释模型中的生物学含义。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

introduced_concepts.name: Index
introduced_concepts.definition: A position marker used to identify a class, state, or summation term.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 用于标记类别、状态或求和项位置的下标。

introduced_concepts.name: Replacement-Site Count
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of replacement, amino-acid-changing sites.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 替换位点（会改变氨基酸的位点）的数量。

introduced_concepts.name: Count

views.name: Replacement-Site Divergence
views.definition: The amount of divergence at replacement, amino-acid-changing sites between species.
views.definition_zh: 替换位点（会改变氨基酸的位点）在物种之间积累的分化量。

introduced_concepts.name: Population Size
introduced_concepts.definition: The number of individuals or gene copies represented by the population model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 模型中表示的个体数或基因拷贝数。

introduced_concepts.name: Replacement-Site Polymorphism
introduced_concepts.definition: The amount of within-species polymorphism at replacement, amino-acid-changing sites.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 物种内替换位点（会改变氨基酸的位点）的多态性数量。

introduced_concepts.name: Silent-Site Polymorphism
introduced_concepts.definition: The amount of within-species polymorphism at silent sites, used as the neutral polymorphism reference.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 物种内沉默位点的多态性数量，常作为中性多态性参照。

introduced_concepts.name: Replacement-Site Segregating Sites
introduced_concepts.definition: The count of segregating replacement sites in the sample.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 样本中替换位点的分离位点数量。

introduced_concepts.name: Silent-Site Segregating Sites
introduced_concepts.definition: The count of segregating silent sites in the sample.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 样本中沉默位点的分离位点数量。

introduced_concepts.name: Replacement-Site Mutation Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: The mutation rate assigned to replacement, amino-acid-changing sites.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 替换位点对应的突变率。

introduced_concepts.name: Silent-Site Mutation Rate
introduced_concepts.definition: The mutation rate assigned to silent sites.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 沉默位点对应的突变率。

introduced_concepts.name: Replacement-Site Theta
introduced_concepts.definition: The neutral diversity parameter for replacement sites.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 替换位点对应的中性多样性参数 θ。

introduced_concepts.name: Silent-Site Theta
introduced_concepts.definition: The neutral diversity parameter for silent sites.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 沉默位点对应的中性多样性参数 θ。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Component
introduced_concepts.definition: A component representing additive genetic contribution in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 表示加性遗传贡献的模型组成部分。
